claim_bullets.bullet_text: Ranger skill allows setting traps up to difficulty equal to thief skill level (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.116-117).
First-aid provided by ranger restores life force to 1 point, takes 30 minutes, cannot fail (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.116-117).
Ranger skill is limited by equipment, armor must be ring mail or non-metal, required strength up to half own strength (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.116-117).

source_record_text: Summary of ranger and sage skills from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, covering outdoor abilities, trap setting, first aid, and sage knowledge skills. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.118-118)
